changes.note: Field populated for the first time

changes.before: Client is currently a sole proprietorship planning to incorporate later in the year. Interested in using Clara for collections, dispatcher‑based job assignment, appointment confirmations, review collection, and leveraging a club membership program for priority scheduling and discounts.
changes.after: Service call fee is $115 and should be mentioned only if the customer asks. Hourly charge is $98 per hour for residential work, billed in half‑hour increments. Preferred notification email is info@benselectricsolutionsteam.com. SMS notifications will use the same number as the main business line. Currently using a personal number as business line; plans to add a second number for personal use. Clara will forward calls from the main line and can transfer calls to the client. Client wants to test configuration before going live.
